---
title: "Unit 9 - Power & Hypotheses"
---

> For this unit, the focus shifts toward asking the question "how do we know if we can trust a result?" We will talk about the hypotheses that we generate as well as the statistical power of a study sample.  

To get some comfort with p-values in general, take a look at a video from Daniel Lakens (~20 minutes) [Video Link](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RVxHlsIw_Do)

## October 31, 2024


[Full Screen](slides-speaker.html)

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides-speaker.html" height="420" width="747" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
